activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Traveller
activities_projects.objective: Examine the personality, curiosity, and observations of the traveller
steps: Read the chapter 'Travel' carefully
Identify key traits of the traveller such as curiosity, patience, and adventurousness
Support each trait with examples from the text
Write a detailed character analysis and present it in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical reading and analytical skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and textual evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring the Theme of Travel
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message and themes conveyed through the journey
steps: Discuss in groups what the journey in the story represents
Identify themes such as discovery, curiosity, or human resilience
Write an analytical paragraph explaining how the theme is developed
Share your interpretation with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to interpret symbolism and thematic depth
activities_projects.evaluation: Originality and clarity of interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Journey Mapping Activity
activities_projects.objective: Trace the traveller's journey and understand narrative structure
steps: Identify the key stages of the traveller’s journey
Create a detailed map showing locations and sequence of events
Add notes on challenges faced, observations made, and lessons learned
Present the journey map to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and narrative mapping skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and clarity of the journey map (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing: Scenes from the Journey
activities_projects.objective: Develop descriptive writing using sensory details
steps: Choose a memorable scene from the traveller’s journey
Write a descriptive paragraph capturing sights, sounds, and feelings
Use figurative language and literary devices
Read your paragraph aloud to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance creativity and descriptive skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of sensory details and literary devices (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing from Observations
activities_projects.objective: Recreate dialogues based on traveller’s interactions
steps: Identify moments of dialogue or interaction in the story
Rewrite the scene emphasizing expressions, emotions, and tone
Add analytical notes on character behaviour
Present your dialogue to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical writing and communication skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, creativity, and analysis depth (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Expansion: Travel Terms
activities_projects.objective: Learn advanced travel-related vocabulary from the chapter
steps: Identify at least 15 challenging words related to travel and exploration
Write their meanings, synonyms, and antonyms
Use each word in two sentences reflecting different contexts
Share examples in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and contextual understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and appropriate sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Travel Diary Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop personal and reflective writing skills
steps: Imagine you are the traveller in the story
Write a diary entry describing a day of your journey
Include reflections, observations, and feelings
Share your diary entry in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve narrative, reflective, and creative writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, coherence, and reflection in writing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Grammar Focus: Complex Sentences
activities_projects.objective: Practice writing complex and compound-complex sentences
steps: Identify complex sentences in the story
Underline main and subordinate clauses
Write three new complex sentences describing the journey
Explain how clauses add depth to writing
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve grammar, syntax, and writing sophistication
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct sentence structure and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Journeys
activities_projects.objective: Analyze similarities and differences between journeys
steps: Discuss in groups the journey in the story versus a real-life journey you know
Identify similarities and differences in experiences, challenges, and discoveries
Write a comparative paragraph
Present your comparison to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical thinking and comparative writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and clarity of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Alternate Ending
activities_projects.objective: Develop imaginative writing while maintaining story coherence
steps: Think about the story’s ending and the traveller’s experience
Create an alternate ending exploring a different adventure or outcome
Include reflections on the traveller’s emotions and observations
Present your alternate ending and explain your creative choices
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop high-level creative writing and critical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, coherence, thematic relevance, and analytical depth (10 marks)
